description: You are a VFX compositor. The studio requires the character walk cycle animation 'dwanko_run.tnz' (located in /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/) to be rendered against a specific Chroma Blue background (RGB: 0, 71, 171 or Hex: #0047AB) for keying. Render at least 24 frames of the animation as a PNG sequence to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/chromakey_render/, ensuring the output frames show the character over the solid blue background rather than transparency.
